ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the player */,
  "skill" TEXT /* Batting skill of the player (e.g., Right-Handed, Left-Handed) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "home_venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home venue of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the coach represents */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team in the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match was played */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which the performance occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player whose performance is being recorded */,
  "mats" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "inns" INTEGER /* Number of innings batted */,
  "n_o" INTEGER /* Number of not out innings */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "hs" INTEGER /* Highest score in the match */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "bf" INTEGER /* Balls faced */,
  "sr" REAL /* Strike rate */,
  "hundred" INTEGER /* Number of hundreds scored */,
  "fifty" INTEGER /* Number of fifties scored */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit */,
  "bowling_figures" TEXT /* Bowling figures for the player in the match, if applicable */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken by the player in the match */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Number of stumpings done by the player in the match */,
  "run-outs" INTEGER /* Number of run-outs affected by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "match_official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match official */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the umpire officiating the match */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the match official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the umpire */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the umpire represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player this statistic belongs to */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the player */,
  "total_innings" INTEGER /* Total innings batted by the player */,
  "total_fours" INTEGER /* Total fours hit by the player */,
  "total_sixes" INTEGER /* Total sixes hit by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_skills" (
  "player_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-skill relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the match */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken in the match */,
  "total_fours" INTEGER /* Total fours hit in the match */,
  "total_sixes" INTEGER /* Total sixes hit in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
